scripts.test: pnpm test:packages && pnpm test:apps && pnpm test:rust && pnpm test:anchor && pnpm test:verification
scripts.test:packages: npm test --prefix packages/sdk && npm test --prefix packages/indexer && npm test --prefix packages/a2a-adapter && npm test --prefix packages/acp-adapter && npm test --prefix packages/eip8004-exporter && npm test --prefix packages/mcp-server
scripts.lint: prettier "**/*.{js,ts}" --check && pnpm --dir examples/multi_agent/society-ui-app lint && pnpm pi-console:lint
scripts.verify:review: pnpm lint && pnpm test:verification && pnpm society:ui:build && pnpm pi-console:test && pnpm pi-console:build
scripts.verify:release: pnpm lint && pnpm verify:qedgen && anchor build --ignore-keys && pnpm --filter @trust-substrate/program-clients build && pnpm --filter @trust-substrate/sdk build && pnpm --filter @trust-substrate/indexer build && pnpm --filter @trust-substrate/a2a-adapter test && pnpm --filter @trust-substrate/acp-adapter test && pnpm --filter @trust-substrate/eip8004-exporter test && pnpm --filter @trust-substrate/mcp-server test && pnpm --filter @trust-substrate/pi-local-runtime build && pnpm --filter @trust-substrate/pi-extension test && pnpm pi-console:test && pnpm pi-console:build && pnpm test:rust && pnpm test:anchor && pnpm test:verification && pnpm test:surfpool
